title: Fix podman-remote support for `podman farm build`
body:
Fix https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/22647

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
Fixed a problem with `podman farm build` command in podman-remote not updating manifests on the registry that have already been pushed
```

comments.body: Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.
